name: Chile Chutney with Grapefruit and Cucumber
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the cucumbers and scoop out the seeds. Slice them into pieces.
Sprinkle over half of the salt on one side.
2. Rinse the remaining vegetables: finely dice red onions, dice tomatoes,
shred cabbage, seed and dice serrano peppers (or Thai pepper).
3. Combine all chopped vegetables in a bowl with citrus juices from oranges,
pink grapefruit, and limes. Add salt to taste.
4. Stir well to combine all ingredients evenly.
5. Chill the mixture for up to 3 days before serving.
6. Serve with burgers or sausages.
